description.value:
Frontier World

Frontier worlds sit at the edges of Imperial space, newly colonised or barely tamed. Their inhabitants are self-reliant settlers, scouts, and pioneers who carve out an existence on the fringe. Life on a frontier world demands sharp eyes and steady aim, for threats — xenos predators, hostile terrain, and renegade raiders — lurk beyond every ridge. These rugged individuals bring hard-won survival instincts and an independent streak to any Inquisitorial warband.

Homeworld Bonus

+Ballistic Skill, +Perception, –Fellowship

Homeworld Aptitude

Ballistic Skill

Wounds

7+1d5

Fate Threshold

3 (Emperor's Blessing 7+)

Starting Skills

Navigate (Surface) or Survival

Homeworld Trait

Frontiersman: Can survive off the land; reduce all Survival test difficulties by one step.

specialAbilities.name: Frontiersman
specialAbilities.description: Can survive off the land; reduce all Survival test difficulties by one step.

system.notes: Emperor's Blessing: On a roll of 7+ on 1d10, the character begins with an extra Fate Point.
